# terrible_community_general_ipa_service (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `krbcanonicalname` (String) Principal of the service. Can not be changed as it is the unique identifier.

### Optional

- `force` (Boolean) Force principal name even if host is not in DNS.
- `hosts` (String) Defines the list of `ManagedBy` hosts.
- `skip_host_check` (Boolean) Force service to be created even when host object does not exist to manage it. This is only used on creation, not for updating existing services.
- `state` (String) State to ensure.

### Read-Only

- `service` (String) Service as returned by IPA API.
